claim: Claude Code v2.1.0 introduced Skill hot-reload: skills in ~/.claude/skills or .claude/skills become immediately available without restart.
quote: Skill hot-reload - Skills in `~/.claude/skills` or `.claude/skills` immediately available without restart

claim: Claude OAuth access tokens are short-lived (roughly one hour) and rely on a refresh token for renewal, which can break autonomous agents mid-run, while static API keys do not expire unless manually rotated.
quote: Claude OAuth access tokens are short-lived and expire after a set period — typically within an hour... The Anthropic API with a persistent API key is the only reliable solution for unattended operation, since API keys don't expire unless you manually rotate them.
